narrative:
Charlestown Township has 1,072 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
